headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Raises Price Target to $226
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Bascome Majors   maintains C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) with a Positive and raises the price target from $215 to $226.

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Raises Price Target to $190
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Fadi Chamoun   maintains C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $180 to $190.
